# Profit Builders — Institutional Options Flow Scanner
> Real-time options flow tracking with conviction grading, accumulation detection, and GEX heatmaps.

## What This Site Is
Profit Builders is a SaaS platform that tracks institutional options flow in real time. The scanner monitors every US options trade via Polygon.io and grades signals by conviction (Grade A = highest, Grade B = standard). Features include sweep/block detection, accumulation tracking (repeated aggressive buys on the same contract), gamma exposure (GEX) heatmaps, and market maker identification.

## Key Pages
- [Homepage](https://profitbuilders.org/) — product overview, feature highlights, pricing
- [Blog](https://profitbuilders.org/blog) — daily flow recaps, educational content on options flow
- [Results](https://profitbuilders.org/results) — public track record of scanner signal outcomes
- [Free Scanner](https://profitbuilders.org/free-scanner) — 15-minute delayed flow viewer, no login required
- [Pricing](https://profitbuilders.org/pricing) — subscription tiers and features

## Blog Content (updated daily)
Daily institutional options flow recaps published after market close. Each post covers:
- Total premium tracked and signal count
- Top tickers by institutional flow
- Notable Grade A signals (large blocks and sweeps)
- Accumulation patterns (repeated aggressive prints on the same contract)
- Prior signals that resolved (receipts with stock price movement)
- Market context (VIX, sector breakdown, directional lean)

## What Makes This Different From Competitors
- Every signal graded by conviction (9 automated filters, not just premium size)
- Accumulation detection (groups repeated prints on same contract)
- Public track record of signal outcomes
- GEX heatmaps showing dealer positioning by strike
- Market maker identification to filter hedging noise
